title: Responsive Layout and Navigation
description: Build the complete responsive layout system and navigation components. Create header component with logo, search bar, navigation links, and user menu. Build mobile-responsive navigation (hamburger menu or bottom nav). Implement global layout wrapper used across all pages. Add loading states and skeleton screens for content loading. Create toast/notification system for user feedback. Ensure all existing pages work well on mobile, tablet, and desktop. Implement dark mode support if time permits. Add PWA configuration for installability.
